pages.text: The Storage Terminal is the direct resource interface. Its grid grows with the window and scrolls when the selected resource group has more visible types than fit.
See $(l:magic_storage:recipes)Recipe Catalog$() for the exact crafting layout.

Use the left resource selector for Items, Fluids, Energy, Gases, or Other registered addon kinds. Item view supports normal extraction and inventory insertion. Other views use display-only representatives and never give you the icon item.

The search field matches names by default. Switch search mode for #tag or @mod queries. Hover a result for its exact stored amount and full details; compact numbers in the grid never replace the exact tooltip value.

Sort by Name, Quantity, Mod, or ID and choose ascending or descending order. Variants with different properties stay separate. Middle-click the resource selector to return to Items. For recipes and Fuel, upgrade to the $(l:magic_storage:crafting_terminal)Crafting Terminal$().
